apollo_success_expression: Telemetry, crew report, and anomaly signals become the first live view of the damaged system.
columbia_failure_expression: Foam strike was visible in launch imagery and identified on Flight Day 2, but the signal did not become a binding safety-of-flight problem.
discrimination: Apollo: anomaly signal becomes a live command problem. Columbia: anomaly signal is seen but not made binding.

apollo_success_expression: Mission logs, procedures, component histories, and telemetry preserve enough state to reason from.
columbia_failure_expression: Prior foam-shedding history and STS-107 debris analysis existed, but the record reinforced normalisation rather than forcing permission change.
discrimination: Apollo: records/procedures support repair. Columbia: records/history support normalisation until post-accident inquiry.

apollo_success_expression: Survival depends on repair method: usable instructions, onboard materials, and no blame-before-repair closure.
columbia_failure_expression: Analysis method converted uncertainty into reassurance; requests for imagery and deeper analysis were channel-fragile rather than mission-binding.
discrimination: Apollo: method expands option-space under constraint. Columbia: method narrows uncertainty into reassurance.

apollo_success_expression: Crew state, life-support needs, available materials, and execution limits remain central to the model.
columbia_failure_expression: Crew survival state depended on wing integrity, but management framing treated the debris strike as an analysis/schedule issue more than a subject-side emergency.
discrimination: Apollo keeps crew-state central. Columbia lets organisational framing dominate subject-state urgency.

apollo_success_expression: Witness, record, authority, time, enforcement, and repair stay connected through crew, Mission Control, and engineers.
columbia_failure_expression: Detection and partial record existed, but authority, time-use, enforcement, and repair did not stay conjunctively linked; the gate broke despite process.
discrimination: Apollo keeps K factors linked. Columbia shows K can fail even when several factors are nominally present.

apollo_success_expression: The anomaly is detected through system signal and crew report rather than suppressed or narratively closed.
columbia_failure_expression: Witness existed: the Intercenter Photo Working Group saw an unusually large strike and concern existed inside engineering channels.
discrimination: Both cases have signal. Discrimination depends on whether signal routes into authority and action.

apollo_success_expression: Telemetry, checklists, and engineering knowledge survive long enough to support correction.
columbia_failure_expression: Records survived after the fact, but during the mission the live record did not force the decision state to remain open.
discrimination: Apollo: live record enables action. Columbia: record becomes more powerful after harm hardens.

apollo_success_expression: Crew and Mission Control retain practical authority to change procedure, trajectory, power use, and life-support configuration.
columbia_failure_expression: Engineers and photo-analysis actors did not have sufficient authority/access to make imagery or safety reassessment bite before re-entry.
discrimination: Apollo distributes authority to problem-solvers. Columbia leaves crucial actors without enough interrupt capacity.

apollo_success_expression: Life-support, CO2, power, water, trajectory, and re-entry windows create hard correction deadlines.
columbia_failure_expression: Time existed during orbit, but it was not converted into executable correction before re-entry hardened the loss.
discrimination: Apollo uses remaining time as repair-space. Columbia consumes remaining time as analysis/closure-space.

apollo_success_expression: Operational command and mission procedure can make the chosen correction bite as executable action, not advice.
columbia_failure_expression: No correction carrier forced management to obtain imagery, reopen assumptions, or prove safety before proceeding to re-entry.
discrimination: Apollo procedures make correction executable. Columbia lacks a carrier that makes uncertainty bite.

apollo_success_expression: LiOH adapter, power-down procedures, trajectory correction, and re-entry preparation materially alter the path.
columbia_failure_expression: Possible response paths were uncertain and limited, but the practical failure begins earlier: the system did not preserve enough information/authority to know whether repair was needed.
discrimination: Apollo repair reaches the subject. Columbia cannot reach repair because witness/authority/knowledge fail first.

apollo_success_expression: The core Apollo expression: working solutions must reach the crew before life-support or trajectory failure hardens.
columbia_failure_expression: Intervention did not beat hardening: uncertainty management continued while the re-entry deadline approached.
discrimination: The pair is the kernel contrast: correction wins in Apollo; hardening wins in Columbia.

apollo_success_expression: Unknown damage is kept live in the model; uncertainty is managed rather than prematurely closed.
columbia_failure_expression: Uncertainty was treated too much as permission to continue rather than a reason to widen evidence and preserve options.
discrimination: Apollo uses uncertainty to widen search. Columbia uses uncertainty too often to justify no escalation.

columbia_failure_expression: A prior pattern — foam strikes were not safety-of-flight issues — overfit the new case and suppressed contrary signal.
discrimination: Columbia is the warning case for inherited-success pattern overfit.

apollo_success_expression: The accident becomes a redesign scar: oxygen-system changes alter later permission structure.
columbia_failure_expression: Safety channels existed but lacked enough independence and bite against program/mission assumptions.
discrimination: Apollo shows a functioning brake; Columbia shows the brake requiring its own brake.

apollo_success_expression: Care for the crew is operational: disciplined signal, constraint, repair, and execution under time pressure.
columbia_failure_expression: Duty of care was structurally present but not operationally toothy enough to compel imaging, escalation, or reversal of closure.
discrimination: Apollo operationalises care. Columbia shows care without sufficient teeth under hierarchy and assumption pressure.
